title: selenicereus testudo
intro: Selenicereus testudo, also known as the 'night-blooming cereus' or 'selenicereus', is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Selenicereus testudo include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's extracts are often used in the form of teas, infusions, or salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
